messages.text: Hi Rob! Good to see you. How's the painting coming along? Anything inspiring you lately, on canvas or in your books?
That long book I was reading was nice
It's wonderful when a book really pulls you in. What made it stand out for you—the story, the characters, or maybe the way it was written? I'd love to hear a bit about it.

Ah, that's right—you mentioned enjoying that long book. I'm afraid I can't recall the title, but the feeling of being absorbed in a good story certainly stays with me. Was it one of those epic tales that feels like a whole journey?
